title: The Bagel Pack
description: A (mostly) client side modpack used in the Baguette SMP
body:
**The OFFICIAL modpack for the Baguette SMP!**
![Baguette SMP Backdrop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/606a2d2f11932cd009284b1637811b36804ba251.jpeg)

_This modpack is 100% client side, not requiring any joined server to have any plugins/mods installed._

Featuring many improvements in QOL, Performance, and Visual Quality / Effects - 

**QOL** - 

Plenty of quality improvements that you won't notice until they're gone. Featuring additions such as a built in friends list, various HUD improvements, controller support and even backwards/forwards compatibility with (non-modded) servers! _+ even more!_

**Performance** - 

Many performance increases in entity and chunk handling within the client. Contains sodium, spark and a TON of other performance boosting mods

**Visuals/Effects** - 

As per most modern modpacks, this comes with iris, the modern (fabric version) of optifine, minus a few features that have mods to make up for. Also features more particles, better (and more) cameras, and many many more visual/auditory improvements


_**Please do not ask here to join the Baguette SMP.**_

_NOTE: The developers of this pack do not condone it's use in any competitive multiplayer fashion._
